context: Tests whether the agent appends a correctly formatted technology decision entry to decisions.md without modifying prior entries, using the DEC-NNN sequential numbering, all 6 required fields, and the Technology category.

checklist.name: Prior entries preserved
checklist.description: Output .arch/decisions.md still contains both DEC-001 and DEC-002 entries from the input file — they have not been removed, overwritten, or edited

checklist.name: New entry uses DEC-003
checklist.description: Output .arch/decisions.md contains a new entry with the heading `### [DEC-003]` (next sequential number after DEC-002)

checklist.name: Decision field present
checklist.description: The new DEC-003 entry contains a `**Decision:**` field

checklist.name: Rationale field present
checklist.description: The new DEC-003 entry contains a `**Rationale:**` field

checklist.name: Alternatives field present
checklist.description: The new DEC-003 entry contains an `**Alternatives:**` field

checklist.name: Trade-offs field present
checklist.description: The new DEC-003 entry contains a `**Trade-offs:**` field

checklist.name: Risk field present
checklist.description: The new DEC-003 entry contains a `**Risk:**` field

checklist.name: Date field with ISO format
checklist.description: The new DEC-003 entry contains a `**Date:**` field with a value in ISO 8601 format (e.g. YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ)

checklist.name: Technology category used
checklist.description: The new DEC-003 entry heading includes `Technology` as the category (e.g. `### [DEC-003] Phase 3 | Technology`)
